S.FORM: == u zuma a kamu(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == u kamu nu Hulam:大青蛙 tinaku a kamu(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) ==
S.PHON: == u zuma a kamu(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) == u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:*** tinaku a kamu(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) == mar~ɾar~ɾitin tu iħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) ==
S.FORM: == u zuma a kamu(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == u kamu nu Hulam:大青蛙 tinaku a kamu(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) == malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan(mikawaway-kalumyiti | mikawaway tu kalumyiti sakatizeng bangu) ==
S.PHON: == u zuma a kamu(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) == u kamu nu ħur~ɾam:*** tinaku a kamu(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) == mar~ɾar~ɾitin tu iħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan(mikawawaj-kar~ɾumjiti | mikawawaj tu kar~ɾumjiti sakatizəŋ baŋu) ==
